# Fundamental

> Fundamental is a platform-native relational field runtime for the DOM, created by Zach Shallbetter (zachshallbetter.com). The core (`@fundamental-engine/core`)
> computes renderer-agnostic field behavior; `@fundamental-engine/dom` binds field behavior to the DOM
> through measurement, state, feedback, relationships, visual bindings, overlays, linting, and
> scheduling; `@fundamental-engine/elements` exposes native HTML and web-component authoring; `@fundamental-engine/react`
> adapts the same contracts for React. Canvas is one render surface, not the whole system: a field is
> **signals-first** — by default it draws nothing and writes `--field-*` CSS variables your styles read.

Every element can become a body in an invisible physics field via the `data-body` attribute:
bodies bend the field, and the field's local density bends them back (reciprocity, returned as
CSS custom properties like `--field-density`). The public 0.x API surface is frozen and
additive-only, enforced in CI from `scripts/api-surface.data.mjs` — the docs' provenance stamps
render from the same file. Generated 2026-06-29 by apps/site/scripts/gen-llms.mjs.

## Start here — don't guess

The mental model is unusual, so confident wrong guesses are common. Before reaching for an API, know:

- **A field is a behavior layer, not a particle background.** It writes `--field-*` variables onto
  `[data-body]` elements; your CSS reads them. Particles are one optional render surface.
- **`render` defaults to `'none'` (signals-first).** A field draws nothing until you opt in
  (`render: 'dots'`). "Nothing showing" is the default, not a bug — the signals are already live.
- **There is one `createField`.** Core's requires `opts.host`; `@fundamental-engine/vanilla`'s is the
  same function with the browser host bundled (+ a `bounds` option for a contained field). Use vanilla.
- **Read the `--field-*` variables and the `field.on(…)` events** for state — not `readParticles()`.
- **The surface is small and frozen.** If an option or method is not in the docs / `api-surface.data.mjs`,
  it does not exist — do not invent it.

Full list with the corrections: [Common mistakes — don't guess](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/common-mistakes.md).

## Docs

- [Start here — Overview](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs): the documentation map — install, the IA, the examples, and the agent endpoints
- [Start here — Getting started](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/getting-started)
- [Start here — Your first field](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/tutorial): step-by-step: npm install to a glowing, reacting headline
- [Start here — A reactive component](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/reactive-component)
- [Start here — Web component](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/guides/web-component): the <field-root> element in any framework or plain HTML
- [Start here — TypeScript](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/guides/typescript): the typed FieldField class from @fundamental-engine/vanilla — no framework, no custom-element registration
- [Start here — React](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/guides/react): the <FieldField> component and the useFieldField hook
- [Start here — Three.js](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/guides/three)
- [Start here — Swift (Apple platforms)](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/guides/swift)
- [Start here — Kotlin (Android)](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/guides/kotlin)
- [Start here — Core engine](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/guides/core): createField on a canvas you own, with an injected host
- [Concepts — Concepts](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/concepts): the mental model — bodies, the shared field context, reciprocity, the vocabulary lanes
- [Concepts — Implementations](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/implementations)
- [Concepts — Natural fields](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/natural-fields): the Natural Field Translation System: gravity → priority, EM → polarity/signal, strong → binding, weak → transformation
- [Concepts — Contour typography](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/contour-typography)
- [Concepts — Narrative walkthrough](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/narrative): one ordinary element revealed as a field participant, layer by layer
- [Concepts — Reading Field](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/reading-field): the flagship platform demo — a content page that measures attention and remembers it
- [Build — Authoring across surfaces](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/authoring): three authoring surfaces, one [data-body] contract
- [Build — Recipe model](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/recipes): the FieldRecipe model — tokens, concepts, metrics, diagnostics, and conditions in separate lanes
- [Build — Field channels](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/field-channels)
- [Build — Platform layer](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/platform): the DOM participation layer — six registries on the six-phase frame scheduler, plus lintPlatform()
- [Build — Performance](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/performance): the scheduler, the integrator hot path, density, and backgrounded-tab behavior
- [Build — Accessibility](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/accessibility): decorative-by-default render layers, reduced motion without loss of meaning
- [Build — Troubleshooting](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/troubleshooting): common gotchas — rescan, reduced motion, canvas clicks, --d not updating
- [Reference — Overview](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api): the complete API surface, generated from the engine catalog
- [Reference — createField](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/options): createField(canvas, opts) and every FieldOptions field with types and defaults
- [Reference — FieldHandle](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/handle): the FieldHandle every entry point returns — all runtime methods
- [Reference — Attributes](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/attributes): every data-* attribute a body reads, plus the CSS variables the field writes back
- [Reference — Metrics](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/metrics): every --field-* custom property the field writes back — ranges, cadence, and when to use each
- [Reference — Types](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/types): the exported TypeScript contracts, core and platform
- [Reference — API stability](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/stability): the frozen 0.x surface and compatibility rules — rendered from the same data CI enforces
- [Reference — Support & stability](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/support)
- [Reference — Forces](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/forces): all 36 forces: per-frame law, attributes read, and an example each
- [Reference — Presets](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/presets): composites (blackhole, galaxy, tornado, …) that expand to primitive bodies
- [Reference — Conditions & formations](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/catalog): conditions, formations, render modes, and palettes — the orthogonal axes
- [Reference — Platform parity matrix](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/parity)
- [Reference — Platform utilities](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/api/utilities)
- [Field studies — Reading Field Study](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/studies/reading-field): a long-form article reinterpreted as a field (attention + memory + citations)
- [Field studies — Review Field Study](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/studies/review-field): a pull request as a field — file heat, reviewer constellation, comment binding
- [Field studies — Search Field Study](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/studies/search-field): search results as a trust gradient with contradiction polarity
- [Field studies — System Weather Study](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/studies/system-weather): a metrics dashboard as weather — heat, pressure, anomalies
- [Field studies — Evidence Field Study](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/studies/evidence-field): claims, sources, and contradiction edges as a deterministic field
- [Field studies — Visual Binding Study](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/studies/visual-binding): an expressive SVG bound to its semantic source via data-field-visual-for
- [Field studies — Showcase](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/showcase): live examples driven by the real field, paired with copy-paste source
- [Field studies — Diagnostic overlays](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/diagnostics): the diagnostic render overlays: contours, potential, topology, causality, prediction
- [Field studies — Inspector](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/inspector): the live system report and --field-density readback panel
- [Field studies — Snapshot viewer](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/snapshots): deterministic per-force fingerprints — the physics-drift regression baseline
- [Field studies — Accessibility preview](https://fundamental-engine.com/docs/accessibility-preview): the animated field and its static fallback, side by side

## Canon

The canonical documents are the project's authority on concepts, terminology, and contracts.
They live in the repository, not on the site:

- [Canonical documentation map](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/README.md): The documentation map for docs/canonical/ — one line per document and its role.
- [Field Agent Consumption Model](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/agent-consumption-model.md): The Field Agent Consumption Model: the unified account of what a force acts on and how each target consumes the influence.
- [Fundamental API stability](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/api-stability.md): This document defines the frozen public API surface for Fundamental 0.x and the compatibility rules that govern it: what is stable, what is experimental, how versions move, and how the alias window works.
- [Fundamental Authoring and Recipes](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/authoring-and-recipes.md): Authoring levels, the intent compiler, the recipe schema, examples, and precedence rules.
- [Common mistakes — don't guess](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/common-mistakes.md)
- [Fundamental Definition Document](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/definition-document.md): The canonical concept and operating model.
- [Migration alias surface — deprecation & removal plan](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/deprecation-plan.md): This document enumerates the migration-era alias surface still shipping for back-compat, gives each alias a deprecation status, and proposes a removal version consistent with the SUPPORT.md deprecation window.
- [Fundamental documentation standards](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/documentation-standards.md): This document governs how Fundamental is described across the docs, the site, and the Lab: the canonical architecture statement, the core doctrine, the document-status taxonomy, the naming policy, and the "verify agai…
- [Feedback Channels](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/feedback-channels.md)
- [Field Possibilities](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/field-possibilities.md)
- [Fundamental Field Behavior Table for Fundamental](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/fundamental-field-behavior-table.md): Field/force laws, the electromagnetic split, fieldflow, and truth modes.
- [Fundamental Interaction and Relationship Model](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/interaction-and-relationship-model.md): Agents beyond particles: users, elements, relationships, events, layout, data, attention, and the interaction grammar.
- [Fundamental Invisible Fields](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/invisible-fields.md): The invisible-fields pattern: running the field with no drawn surface at all, so its measurements come back as typography, ink, and anchor.
- [Lifecycle contract — register · measure · unmount](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/lifecycle-contract.md)
- [Natural Fields](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/natural-fields.md): This document defines the Natural Field Translation System — how Fundamental translates the four fundamental fields into interface behavior.
- [Cross-platform parity matrix](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/parity-matrix.md)
- [Fundamental platform architecture](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/platform-architecture.md): This document defines the current @fundamental-engine/dom architecture as of the runtime-platform unification phase (Phase D): the FrameScheduler, the six registries, lintPlatform(), the live <field-root> runtime, and…
- [Support matrix](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/support-matrix.md)
- [Fundamental System Contracts](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/system-contracts.md): Hard contracts for bodies, fields, forces, agents, events, feedback, recipes, accessibility, performance, conformance, and the platform.
- [Fundamental Testing and Conformance](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/testing-and-conformance.md): The test matrix, conformance gates, force passports, and platform/scheduler/lint coverage.
- [Time in the Field](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/time.md): How Fundamental handles time: the three clocks (simulation, experiential, world), the temporal kernels, and the declared-timestamp contract (data-field-at).
- [Use Cases](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/use-cases.md)
- [Fundamental Visual Language and Geometry System](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/visual-language-and-geometry.md): Typography, color, shape, distance, pattern, emission, containers, surfaces, and visual semantics.
- [Visualization Methods Taxonomy for Fundamental](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine/blob/main/docs/canonical/visualization-methods-taxonomy.md): Render layers, diagnostics, heatmaps, field lines, probes, energy, topology, causality, and prediction.

## Examples

The invisible-field example family — twelve ordinary page types running as fields over real
data, with no particle swarm; each ships a committed data snapshot and upgrades itself to live
counts when its source is reachable:

- [Evidence](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence): citations are mass — trust you can feel in the type
- [Inbox](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/inbox): urgency is mass; attention is one finite budget; old asks decay toward quiet
- [Market](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/market): market cap is mass; the day's move polarizes; correlated assets thread
- [Backlog](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/backlog): priority is mass; references bind; the cycle is a sink with capacity
- [Calendar](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/calendar): the next launch pulls hardest; imminence ramps the weight in real time
- [Threads](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/threads): votes are mass; controversy is charge; reply chains bind and heat
- [Dependencies](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/dependencies): downloads are mass; staleness decays; one advisory charges the graph
- [Fleet](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/fleet): services carry traffic; incidents accrete their updates; impact is heat
- [Catalog](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/catalog): review consensus is mass — the evidence trust math, retargeted at a shelf
- [Library](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/library): listens are mass; the queue accretes and releases
- [Memory](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/memory): the forgetting curve is decay; frequency anchors; review re-binds
- [Newsroom](https://fundamental-engine.com/evidence/newsroom): pageviews are mass; the cycle's rise and fall polarizes

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://fundamental-engine.com/llms-full.txt): every canonical document, concatenated into one file
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/fundamental-engine): the monorepo — core, platform, elements, react, vanilla, and this site
- [Writings](https://fundamental-engine.com/writings): the eight-paper research family on the field model
- [The Lab](https://fundamental-engine.com/lab): a physics detector — fire a particle into any force and verify its law
- [Design system](https://fundamental-engine.com/design): tokens, the force palette, type, and glyphs
